items.name: ASR-TTS-paper-daily
items.description: ASR-TTS Paper Daily automatically queries arXiv (with a Papers with Code fallback) to curate, categorize, and publish a daily-updated list of the latest research in speech and language technology—including ASR, TTS, machine translation, small language models, data augmentation, and synthetic generation—with direct links to papers and code.
